name: Hangzhou Todaytec Digital Co., Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Todaytec Digital Co., Ltd manufactures and sells thermal transfer ribbons in China and internationally. The company offers wax ribbons, wax/resin ribbons, resin ribbons, fax ribbons, hot stamping foils, tattoo stencil papers, and jumbo rolls. Its products are used in inventory label, medical wrist strap, wash care, blood bank, medicare, logistice, engine, jewelry, tag, chemical barrel, ticket/bill, super market, nameplate, outdoor tag, and ID card copy applications. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
